description_long: This is a pair of women's open-toe heeled sandals featuring a rich burgundy color. The shoes have two wide, smooth straps across the top of the foot, providing both style and support. The heel is a low, chunky block style, offering stability and comfort for walking on urban surfaces. The insole appears to be lightly cushioned and matches the upper in color, while the outsole is a contrasting light beige, likely made of synthetic material for durability. The branding 'NAZIM' is visible on the insole, suggesting a specific designer or manufacturer. The overall design is modern and elegant, suitable for casual or semi-formal urban settings.
description: A pair of burgundy open-toe heeled sandals with two wide straps and a chunky block heel, featuring a light beige sole and visible branding on the insole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design, two wide straps, and the slightly raised block heel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the chunky heel, the arch of the sole, and the smooth, wide straps.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the solid block heels and the back of the insole, with branding partially visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view displaying both the heel structure and the arrangement of the straps across the foot.
attribute_logo: white text logo on the insole near the heel
